title: harvard-edge/cs249r_book
abstract: Comprehensive textbook on Machine Learning Systems covering the full lifecycle of ML deployment, from model training to production serving, with hands-on exercises and real-world case studies.
abstract_zh: 哈佛大学《机器学习系统》教科书！覆盖ML部署全生命周期 - 从模型训练到生产服务，配有动手练习和真实案例研究。AI工程师的必读之作。
